updates.title: Office of the Chief Administrative Hearing Officer, Chief Administrative Law Judge
updates.summary: On October 7, 2020, the Department of Justice ("Department") published an interim final rule ("IFR") amending the regulations governing the Office of the Chief Administrative Hearing Officer ("OCAHO"). The amendments reflected changes related to the creation of the position of the Chief Administrative Law Judge ("CALJ") and made additional related technical changes. This final rule adopts the provisions of the IFR wi

updates.title: Endangered and Threatened Wildlife and Plants; Removal of the North Park Phacelia From the List of Endangered and Threatened Plants
updates.summary: We, the U.S. Fish and Wildlife Service (Service), are reopening the comment period on our March 19, 2024, proposed rule to delist the North Park phacelia (Phacelia formosula), a plant found in the state of Colorado, from the Federal List of Endangered and Threatened Plants under the Endangered Species Act of 1973, as amended (Act). We are reopening the proposed rule's comment period for 30 days to give all interested

updates.title: Amendment of Class E Airspace; Miami, FL
updates.summary: This action corrects a final rule published by the FAA in the Federal Register on February 13, 2026, amending Class D and E airspace in Miami, FL. This action corrects discrepancies between the discussion of the rule in the preamble, which contained the accurate airspace description for the Class E airspace for Miami Executive, and the legal description, which failed to implement the changes.

updates.title: Submission for OMB Review; 30-Day Comment Request Application and Impact of Clinical Research Training on Healthcare Professionals in Academia and Clinical Research (Office of the Director)
updates.summary: In compliance with the Paperwork Reduction Act of 1995, the National Institutes of Health (NIH) has submitted to the Office of Management and Budget (OMB) a request for review and approval of the information collection listed below.

updates.title: Agency Information Collection Activities: Proposed Collection; Comment Request
updates.summary: The Centers for Medicare & Medicaid Services (CMS) is announcing an opportunity for the public to comment on CMS' intention to collect information from the public. updates.title: Commission Information Collection Activities (FERC-515) Comment Request; Extension
updates.summary: In compliance with the requirements of the Paperwork Reduction Act of 1995, 44 U.S.C. 3507(a)(1)(D), the Federal Energy Regulatory Commission (Commission or FERC) is submitting its information collection FERC-515: Declaration of Intention to the Office of Management and Budget (OMB) for review of the information collection requirements. There are no proposed changes to this collection.

updates.title: Proposed Collection; 60-Day Comment Request; NIH Office of Intramural Training & Education-Application, Registration, and Alumni Systems Office of the Director
updates.summary: In compliance with the requirement of the Paperwork Reduction Act of 1995 to provide opportunity for public comment on proposed data collection projects, the National Institutes of Health Office of Intramural Training & Education (OITE) will publish periodic summaries of proposed projects to be submitted to the Office of Management and Budget (OMB) for review and approval.

updates.title: ChemoCentryx, Inc.; Proposal To Withdraw Approval of New Drug Application for TAVNEOS (Avacopan) Capsule, 10 Milligrams; Opportunity for a Hearing
updates.summary: The Food and Drug Administration's (FDA, Agency, or we) Center for Drug Evaluation and Research (CDER) is proposing to withdraw approval of the new drug application (NDA) for TAVNEOS (avacopan) capsule, 10 milligrams (mg), held by ChemoCentryx, Inc., One Amgen Center Dr., Thousand Oaks, CA 91320 (ChemoCentryx or applicant), and is announcing an opportunity for the applicant to request a hearing on this proposal. The

updates.title: New England Fishery Management Council; Public Meeting
updates.summary: The New England Fishery Management Council (Council) is scheduling a public meeting of its Enforcement Committee via webinar to consider actions affecting New England fisheries in the exclusive economic zone (EEZ). Recommendations from this group will be brought to the full Council for formal consideration and action, if appropriate.

updates.title: New England Fishery Management Council; Public Meeting
updates.summary: The New England Fishery Management Council (Council) is scheduling a public meeting of its Joint Whiting Committee and Advisory Panel to consider actions affecting New England fisheries in the exclusive economic zone (EEZ). This meeting will be held in-person with a webinar option. Recommendations from this group will be brought to the full Council for formal consideration and action, if appropriate.

updates.title: Section 337 Adjudication and Enforcement
updates.summary: The United States International Trade Commission ("Commission") proposes to amend its Rules of Practice and Procedure concerning section 337 adjudication and enforcement.
